bead.title: [visual-suite] V6 generate principle composite (pressure-test gate)
bead.description: Per plan: docs/helix/02-design/plan-2026-04-29-visual-suite.md. Author principle-composite prompt + generate via nano-banana-pro-openrouter. FIRST RENDER — pressure-test the lever/fulcrum/load metaphor. If it doesn't read, pause and revise. Budget tracking starts here: $10 total cap, $1.50/image halt trigger. HARD BLOCKED on artifact infrastructure: ddx-d5e71fb3 (FEAT-010 three-layer substrate), ddx-5d92b873 (FEAT-007 sidecar + generated_by edge), and ddx artifact regenerate CLI implementation. NO MANUAL FALLBACK — if those slip, V6 slips.
